home.subtitle: Test your geography knowledge

features.flagsDesc: Identify flags from countries around the world
features.mapsDesc: Locate cities and capitals on the map

home.quickTrustLine: No intrusive ads · quick rounds · mobile-first experience
home.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {{name}}! Your next match is one tap away.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.completeFieldsHint: Complete email and password to continue.
auth.invalidEmail: That email doesn't look complete — something like you@example.com
auth.loginFailed: That email and password don't match. Want to try again?
auth.rateLimitError: For safety we paused attempts for a moment. Try again in {{minutes}} min
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll help you get back in shortly
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a link. Check your spam folder too 📬
auth.resetSuccess: Your password was updated. You can now log in.
auth.resetTokenInvalid: This link isn't valid anymore. It may have expired.

menu.dailyChallengeDesc: 10 questions · same for everyone · one attempt
menu.singlePlayerDesc: 10 rounds · 10s each · play at your pace
menu.streakDesc: How many can you get in a row? 🔥
menu.rankingsDesc: See the global top and your position
menu.categoryHelper: Pick how you want to practice today. You can change this category anytime.
menu.quickActionsHelper: If you prefer, jump straight to your stats or the global ranking.
menu.welcomeExplore: Hi {{name}}! What shall we explore today?
menu.modeHelper: Then choose your pace: quick, competitive, or calm practice.
menu.flashNoMap: Flash mode does not support maps — pick another category
menu.flagMasterDesc: 10 rounds · no color, cropped, lookalike traps · multipliers up to x2.5

flash.objective: Answer as many questions as you can in 60 seconds.
flash.rule: The clock runs for the whole game, not per question.
flash.tip: Chain correct answers to build your combo up to x10.

single.objective: Answer 10 questions at your own pace.
single.tip: Great for practicing without pressure before a duel.

duel.objective: Compete in real time against another player.
duel.rule: You both answer the same 10 questions; the higher score wins.
duel.tip: Speed adds points too, not just accuracy.

streak.objective: Get as many questions right in a row as possible.
streak.rule: One mistake ends the streak — there's no question limit.
streak.tip: Use Streak Shield if you have one before taking a risky guess.

survival.rule: You start with 2 lives; every mistake costs one.
survival.tip: 4 correct answers in a row earns you an extra life.

challenge.rule: Everyone plays the same setup whenever they want.
challenge.tip: Invite more players to make it more competitive.

flagMaster.question: Which country does this flag belong to?
flagMaster.confirmExit: Sure? You will lose your progress.

modifierDesc.grayscale: In black and white: no color.
modifierDesc.crop: You only see a portion of the flag.
modifierDesc.similar: All 4 options are nearly identical flags.
modifierDesc.combined: Everything stacked: cropped, grayscale and tricky options.

serverWakeUp.title: Loading GeoChallenge…
serverWakeUp.body: This may take a few seconds the first time.
serverWakeUp.rotating3: Free servers take their naps too 😴
serverWakeUp.tooLong: This is taking longer than usual — you can keep waiting or try offline mode

survival.title: Survival
survival.subtitle: Are you the last one standing?
survival.ruleOneLive: You start with 2 lives. One wrong answer takes 1 away.
survival.ruleDifficulty: Questions 1-5 Easy, 6-10 Medium, 11+ Hard. Timer gets shorter.
survival.ruleStreak: 4 correct in a row = +1 life (max 4). Streak doesn't reset when you earn a life.
survival.ruleWin: The last player with a life wins.
survival.youEliminated: You were eliminated. Watch how it ends.
survival.cancelledNotEnoughPlayers: Match cancelled due to not enough players
survival.autoStartHint: The match starts automatically once the room fills
survival.eliminatedWarm: You made it to round {{round}} of {{total}} 💪 Stick around to see the finish

game.confirmExit: Are you sure you want to exit? You will lose your progress.
game.questionFlag: Which country does this flag belong to?
game.questionSilhouette: What country does this silhouette represent?
game.questionMonumentCountry: In which country is this monument?
game.clickMap: Click on the map to select the location
game.selectionReadyHint: Option selected. Press Submit to check your answer.
game.tapNextHint: Answer saved. Press Next to continue.
game.tapResultsHint: Answer saved. Press See Results to finish.
game.selectOnMapHint: Pick a location on the map to continue.
game.lowTimeHint: {{seconds}} seconds left. Take a breath and confirm your answer.
game.shortGameConfirm: Only {{available}} questions are available (out of {{requested}} requested). Do you want to play anyway?
game.shortGameCancelled: Game cancelled. Try another category or setup to get more questions.

map.keyboardInstructions: Use the arrow keys to pan the map, + and - to zoom, and Enter to place your answer at the center

results.shareText: 🎯 I just finished a GeoChallenge round with {{score}} points ({{correct}}/{{total}} correct, {{accuracy}} accuracy). Think you can beat me?
results.pointsBreakdownTitle: What gave you the most points
results.pendingSync: 📡 Result saved on this device — it'll sync automatically
results.streakShort: Everyone starts here. One more and you'll find your rhythm.
results.streakMid: Solid streak! Your record is within reach.
results.growthMindset: The first games are the hardest — each one teaches you new flags 🌱

duel.averageWaitHint: This usually takes under 30 seconds. Thanks for waiting.
duel.cancelHint: You can cancel the search at any time.
duel.errorGeneric: We couldn't continue the duel. Please try again.
duel.reconnectedSyncing: Connection restored. Syncing the current round...
duel.searchTimeout: No opponent found. Try again later.
duel.connectionErrorNotice: We couldn't connect to the match server. Retrying…
duel.syncingLong: Syncing with the match… your progress is safe
duel.expectedWait: Most players find an opponent in under 1 min
duel.searchTimeoutWarm: No one showed up this time 😅 Try another category or check back in a few minutes
duel.rematchNudge: {{opponent}} brought their A-game today. Rematch whenever you're ready.
duel.wonByForfeit: {{opponent}} left the match. Win goes to you — it still counts for your ranking ✓

install.title: Install GeoChallenge
install.hint: Add it to your home screen for faster, browser-free play.
install.iosHint: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen in Safari.

offline.queued: Result saved. It will sync when you're back online.

flash.title: Flash
flash.intro: 60 seconds. Flags and silhouettes. Tap or swipe. Chain hits to multiply up to x10.
flash.ruleSwipe: Swipe left/right or tap the option
flash.swipeHint: Swipe ← or → · or tap an option
flash.cinemaWhereCountry: In which country was it filmed?
flash.cinemaWhereCity: In which city was it filmed?
flash.ruleCombo: Combo x1 → x2 → x3 → x5 → x8 → x10
flash.ruleMiss: A miss resets the combo, the round continues

mechanics.streakShieldTriggered: 🛡️ Your shield saved the streak! Keep going

mechanics.streakShieldTooltip: Protects your streak from one mistake — 1 per game
mechanics.coachmarkTitle: Your power-ups 👇 tap them when you need them

filters.title: Filter questions

pwa.updateAvailable: GeoChallenge just updated ✨ Changes apply on reload

apiErrors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Something in the form doesn't add up — check the highlighted fields
apiErrors.AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: That email and password don't match. Want to try again?
apiErrors.AUTH_EMAIL_TAKEN: That email already has an account — want to log in instead?
apiErrors.AUTH_USERNAME_TAKEN: That username is already taken, try another one
apiErrors.AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: This link isn't valid. It may have already been used.
apiErrors.AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: This link has expired — request a new one
apiErrors.CHALLENGE_NOT_ENOUGH_QUESTIONS: Not enough questions for those filters — try widening your categories 🗺️
apiErrors.CHALLENGE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find that challenge — it may have expired
apiErrors.GAME_NOT_ENOUGH_QUESTIONS: Only {{available}} questions are available (out of {{requested}} requested)
apiErrors.GAME_INSUFFICIENT_QUESTIONS_SHORT: Not enough questions for this setup — try another category
apiErrors.DUEL_RATE_LIMITED: You're going too fast — wait a moment before trying again
apiErrors.DUEL_ERROR_GENERIC: We couldn't continue the duel. Please try again.
apiErrors.SURVIVAL_ERROR_GENERIC: Something went wrong in the survival match. Please try again.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMITED: For safety we paused attempts for a moment. Try again in {{minutes}} min
apiErrors.INTERNAL: Something went wrong on our end 😓 It's already been logged (ref: {{requestId}}). Please try again in a moment.
